data.body:
PROGRESS — slice 2/4 done (config-loop, hourly /loop iteration). reconciler.* now routes through the typed Config as the config-FILE layer:
- config.py: new _CANONICAL_ENV_NAMES per-key map + _canonical_env_name() so the ergonomic env names are the NON-deprecated canonical overrides of the nested section key (reconciler.jira_cli_timeout<-REBAR_JIRA_CLI_TIMEOUT, reconciler.id_guard_bypass_unsafe<-REBAR_UNSAFE_ID_GUARD_BYPASS); env_overrides() AND _env_signature() both consult it (cache key stays correct). EV-3c old names (REBAR_ACLI_TIMEOUT, REBAR_RECONCILER_LOCK_RETRY_BUDGET, RECONCILER_ABSENT_GET_BUDGET, REBAR_ID_GUARD_MODE) added to _LEGACY_ENV_ALIASES (canonical-wins + warn). _map_legacy_env extended for the REBAR_ID_GUARD_MODE value-flip (warn->true/raise->false). New _LEGACY_FLAT_CONF_KEYS + _map_legacy_flat_conf wire the legacy FLAT .rebar/config.conf key rebar_id_guard_mode -> reconciler.id_guard_bypass_unsafe (canonical dotted wins if both present).
- Consumers rerouted to load_config().reconciler.*: acli_subprocess._acli_call_timeout (jira_cli_timeout; 0/neg->120 default preserved), _advisory_lock._resolve_retry_budget (lock_max_retries; 0->max(1,0)=1; dropped now-unused os import + the two _LOCK_*_ENV consts), outbound_differ deletion-probe (deletion_probe_limit), rebar_id_audit._resolve_id_guard_bypass (id_guard_bypass_unsafe; FAIL-CLOSED on ConfigError -> guard active; loud per-violation bypass warning preserved). _get_rebar_id_guard_mode_from_config + _rebar_env retained (applier re-exports them).
- Tests: new tests/unit/rebar_reconciler/state/test_config_file_wiring.py (21 cases: param x location {pyproject, rebar.toml, legacy dotted+flat conf, XDG user, canonical+legacy env, rebar -c} x precedence CLI>env>project>user>default + fail-closed + provenance). Updated test_rebar_id_label_writers.py guard-mode-precedence to drive config via the real legacy conf + env (no longer patches the bypassed helper).
- Full offline suite GREEN (2016 passed, was 1995; +21), ruff check + format clean, subagent review clean (all 7 invariants confirmed: fail-closed id-guard, value-flip, canonical-env mapping, precedence, default-value parity, no dead imports, cache correctness). REMAINING: slice 3 (jira.* JIRA_URL/USER/PROJECT consumers fall back to load_config().jira.*, secret JIRA_API_TOKEN env-only), slice 4 (llm.* [tool.rebar.llm] in LLMConfig.from_env).
